children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall designate a coordinating office to convene an interagency working group consisting of representatives from the Departments of the Interior, Justice, State, and Homeland Security.
to facilitate the repatriation to Indian Tribes and Native Hawaiian organizations of items that have been illegally removed or trafficked in violation of applicable law;
to protect tangible cultural heritage, cultural items, and archaeological resources still in the possession of Indian Tribes and Native Hawaiian organizations; and

children.label: A
children.text: the Native American Graves Protection and Repatriation Act ( et seq.) (including , as added by that Act);25 U.S.C. 3001section 1170 of title 18

children.label: B
children.text: the Archaeological Resources Protection Act of 1979 ( et seq.); and16 U.S.C. 470aa

children.label: A
children.text: the voluntary return of tangible cultural heritage under ; andsection 3074 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: halting international sales of items that are prohibited from being trafficked under Federal law; and

children.label: A
children.text: the Native working group convened under ;section 3076(a) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the review committee established under section 8(a) of the Native American Graves Protection and Repatriation Act ();25 U.S.C. 3006(a)

children.label: C
children.text: the Cultural Heritage Coordinating Committee established pursuant to section 2 of the Protect and Preserve International Cultural Property Act (; note); andPublic Law 114–15119 U.S.C. 2601

children.label: D
children.text: any other relevant committees and working groups.
